# SMIG Mauritanie

Source: ILO ILOSTAT — EAR_INEE_CUR_NB_A dataset
Last updated in dataset: 2022
Type: Rate of the SMIG when SMIG/SMAG system
Currency: MRT - Ouguiya (MRU) — new ouguiya (post-2018 redenomination)

## Values
Monthly: 3,000 MRU
Daily: 115.4 MRU (3000 / 26 working days)
Hourly: 14.4 MRU (115.4 / 8 hours)

## USD equivalent (2022)
Monthly: ~$81 USD

## Notes
- Data is from 2022 — verify if updated since
- Using SMIG is a conservative lower bound
- Informal workers in Nouakchott typically earn 1.4–2x SMIG
- All wage calculations use 1.0x / 1.4x / 1.8x multiplier range

## SOMELEC Commercial Rate
Rate: 5.903 MRU/kWh (INDUST/ARTISAN/COMMERCE tariff)
Source: Tarifs_Basse_Tension.xls — official SOMELEC tariff sheet
